steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “already-strong performance” reveals that the program is currently working well, not poorly or inconsistently.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the answer
steps.content: ”Reliably” expresses consistent, dependable success—exactly what the passage shows through “in the vast majority of cases” and accurate material-type distinction. Rarely, slowly, and clumsily each conflict with this demonstrated capability. That matches choice B — B is correct.
